CONTENT.Honours: IndividualSuperliga Team of the Month: September 2023
CONTENT.Club career: On 26 August 2021, Achouri joined Liga Portugal 2 club Trofense on loan from Estoril. On 31 August 2022, Achouri joined Danish Superliga side Viborg FF on a deal until June 2025.Achouri made the move to 15-time Danish Superliga champions Copenhagen on 24 July 2023, signing a four-year deal with the Lions.
CONTENT.External links: Profile at the F.C. Copenhagen websiteElias Achouri – UEFA competition record (archive)
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 31 May 2024As of match played 24 January 2024
CONTENT.International career: Achouri was born in Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis to a Tunisian father and an Algerian mother. He debuted for the Tunisia national team in a 4–0  win over Equatorial Guinea on 2 June 2022.

SUMMARY: Mohamed Elias Achouri (born 10 February 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Danish Superliga side Copenhagen. Born in France, Achouri plays for the Tunisia national team.
